# daytona_sandbox_access (Data Source)

Checks whether the authenticated Daytona user has access to a sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_access" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID.

### Read-Only

- `has_access` (Boolean) Whether the authenticated user has access to the sandbox.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
